caption: don't miss the EVICTED art show at @ddaatteelliinnee gallery tomorrow night . honored to exhibit work with my rhinoceropolis fam. along with 3 paintings, I have lots of new posters, prints, & 90 min killd by music tapes for sale . raising money for airfare to Mexico City in feb to play a few shows and attend the Material Arts Fair . Face2Face in cyberspace , Never been outside the U.S.A #prayerhands see u there
